query: CREATE TABLE `widget_tokens` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `businessId` int NOT NULL, `token` varchar(128) NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Default Widget', `config` json, `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `leadsGenerated` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `viewCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `widget_tokens_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `widget_tokens_token_unique` UNIQUE(`token`))
